name: NETGEAR, Inc.
description: NETGEAR, Inc. is a global networking company that delivers innovative networking and internet-connected products to consumers, businesses, and service providers. Headquartered in San Jose, California, the company specializes in high-performance home WiFi systems, networking solutions for small and medium-sized businesses, and advanced ProAV technology. With a focus on reliability, security, and ease of use, NETGEAR empowers people and organizations to connect, collaborate, and thrive in the digital world. For over 30 years, the company has been a leader in the industry, consistently pushing the boundaries of connectivity through thoughtful design and advanced technology.
